title: pittosporum gayanum f. waialealae
intro: Pittosporum gayanum f. waialealae, also known as Waialealae, is a species of flowering plant in the Pittosporaceae family, specifically a variant of the Pittosporum gayanum tree native to Hawaii. The Waialealae tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being. In Hawaiian herbal medicine, Waialealae is typically prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
